description: Create a two-column content slide on Digital Transformation/IoT economic value creation with four KPI cards split between Europe and Global forecasts.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: Roland Berger and others are forecasting vast market dynamics: Digital Transformation/IoT boost global economy over next decades
header.sub: Economic value creation in Europe and globally with Digital Transformation/IoT

items.label: Roland Berger estimates an increase in value added through Digital Transformation of 20-30% or EUR 1.25 trillion for European industry by 2025
The European Commission predicts that the EU market value of the IoT is expected to exceed EUR 1 trillion in 2020
Cisco predicts that IoT will generate USD 8 trillion worldwide in Value at Stake over the next decade (2015-2024)
Machina Research estimates the total IoT revenue opportunity at USD 3 trillion in 2025 (up from USD 750 billion in 2015)

footer.source: Roland Berger, European Commission, Cisco, Machina Research
